chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, delivery information

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: single line in a Sales Order

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: unit price at time of order

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item.Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The product identifier used in an Order Line Item to reference the associated product (i.e., the link from a line item to a product).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical,

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment is the business entity representing a payment transaction with a unique identifier (PAYMENT_ID) and amount, associated with exactly one Sales Order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
References exactly one Sales Order | Payment amount | Confirmation timestamp | Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipped In Transit Delivered
entities_post_resolution.definition: A set of shipment status codes representing the stages in order fulfillment: Preparing, Shipped, In_Transit, Delivered.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Column Details**:
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform, categorized into exactly one category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform. | **Key Attributes**:
- Belongs to exactly one Category | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code | **Key Attributes**:
- Human-readable product name | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must belong to a valid category before being sold | **Related Concepts**: Category, Inventory, OrderLineItem | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | References exactly one Product | A Product belongs to exactly one Category | A Product appears on zero or more Order Line Items | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: Sales Order Header (SALES_ORDER_HDR) is the header record for each customer sales order, uniquely identified by ORDER_ID and containing the customer identifier CUST_ID, with links to order lines and payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is a record representing goods shipped for a Sales Order, identified by SHIPMENT_ID, linked to exactly one Sales Order, and tracked by a tracking number.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
References exactly one Sales Order | Tracking number | Source Warehouse | Destination Customer Address | Shipped timestamp | Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A formal transaction document created at checkout representing a customer’s order to purchase products, capturing the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Business Context**: Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | **Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Business Rules**:
- Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped | **Business Rules**:
- Status changes are logged for audit purposes | **Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order | **Related Concepts**: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress | A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | References exactly one Sales Order | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | A Sales Order has one or more Paymen

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID represents the primary key that uniquely identifies a product in the master product catalog and is used to reference products elsewhere (e.g., order lines).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree.

**Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: Master customer entity representing all registered platform customers, identified by the CUST_ID primary key and referenced by related records such as sales orders.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO |
| FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO | | | EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Destination Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: An address used as the delivery destination for a customer's orders.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Destination Customer Address | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | A Customer places zero or more Sales Orders | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: a business policy that defines the conditions and timeframe under which customers may return purchased products and receive a refund if eligible.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Source Warehouse
entities_post_resolution.definition: The source warehouse from which shipments originate, identified by its warehouse code.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Source Warehouse | **Column Details**:
| WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse

entities_post_resolution.name: Varchar
entities_post_resolution.definition: Variable-length character string data type used to store text in a column, with length specified by the parentheses (e.g., VARCHAR(150) or VARCHAR(200)).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO |
| FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO |

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional classification, and activation status for active customers.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, stock-keeping units, names, category linkage, pricing, and whether the product is active.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical product category information used to classify products and relate subcategories to their parent categories.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about sales orders, including customer reference, order timing, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timing, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the line-item details for each order, including the order reference, product, quantity, unit price, and total line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for when the payment was confirmed and created.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores shipment records linking orders to warehouse shipments, including shipment timing, tracking details, and current status.
